summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 17/05/2025
The global ship recycling market remained largely stagnant this week, with limited activity across key regions. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-05-17_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-10-May-16-May-2025_compressed.pdf

Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The global ship recycling market remained largely stagnant this week, with limited activity across key regions. In India, conditions were unchanged, with
persistent liquidity issues and weak steel demand keeping sentiment subdued.
